writing.title: Writing Task 1: Status update
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing the status of some tasks, using already/just/yet.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have already finished the report. The store has just opened a few minutes ago. They haven't launched the new product yet, but it's coming soon.
checklist: Dùng already cho việc đã hoàn thành
Dùng just cho việc vừa mới xảy ra
Dùng yet trong câu phủ định hoặc câu hỏi

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Duration of time
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing how long something has lasted, using since/for.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have lived in this city for ten years. I have worked at this company since 2018. We haven't met for a long time.
checklist: Dùng since + điểm mốc thời gian
Phân biệt đúng for và since
